api_key.description: Qualaroo API key. Legacy nudge endpoints send it as Authorization: Token token="<api_key>"; the Reporting API uses it as the HTTP Basic username. Never logged.

api_secret.description: Optional Qualaroo Reporting API secret. When provided, the bundle uses HTTP Basic auth for reporting response reads.

base_url.description: Qualaroo API base URL override for tests or proxies.

survey_id.description: Qualaroo survey/nudge id used by the documented Reporting API response endpoint.
